creator: i+fbsd@amlegion.org
text:
This port is not up to date. The latest version is 1.6.3, the current version is 1.2.x in ports. FreeBSD missed out completely on the 1.4.x series. There is probably a coresponding mu4e update that needs to be looked into alongside this.

bug #249244, comment #7 has a patch for trying 1.6.3 as well, no idea if it'll help with mu4e though.
